hints.title: Hint 1 — Kadane's Algorithm
hints.content: Track the current running sum. If it drops below zero, reset it to zero (start a new subarray). At each step, update the global maximum.

hints.title: Hint 2
hints.content: `curr = max(nums[i], curr + nums[i])` — either extend the existing subarray or start fresh from `nums[i]`.
